india_trends.title: Akasa Air sets up entity for aircraft financing, leasing in GIFT City
india_trends.summary: Akasa Air has set up a new entity at GIFT City in Gujarat. This move aims to boost its aircraft financing and leasing operations. The new company, Akasa Air Leasing IFSC Private Limited, will help the airline secure better financing. It will also allow for more flexibility and cost efficiency.
